description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style handgun with a robust, boxy metal frame and a dark, weathered finish. The body features angular lines, prominent ridges, and a rectangular profile, with a short, thick barrel protruding from the front. The grip is vertically oriented, textured, and appears to be made of a different material or finish for improved handling. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing ample space around the trigger. There are visible mechanical details such as a charging handle, ejection port, and magazine well, as well as subtle engravings and markings on the slide. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, tactical weapon suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun-style handgun with a dark, weathered metal finish, textured grip, and prominent mechanical details. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring angular lines and visible engravings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the short, thick barrel, squared-off slide, and the top-mounted sights, emphasizing the weapon's width and robust construction.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full length of the slide, visible engravings, charging handle, ejection port, and the textured grip with its vertical magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip, showing the symmetry and boxy profile of the handgun.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals additional slide details, the trigger, trigger guard, and the magazine release area, mirroring the left side's mechanical features.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is vertically oriented with a slightly flared base and features a textured, ribbed surface for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of a polymer or composite material, contrasting with the metallic body. The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, with subtle finger grooves and a visible seam along the backstrap. There are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared and robust, with a thick profile and ample space around the trigger. It has a straight lower edge and rounded corners, providing both protection and accessibility. The guard appears reinforced and lacks decorative elements, focusing on functionality and durability.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and thick, with a plain, non-threaded muzzle and a smooth exterior profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or fluting, and the finish matches the rest of the weapon's dark, matte metal. The barrel is integrated seamlessly into the slide, with no external markings.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle engravings on both sides, including what appears to be a serial number, manufacturer information, and possibly a model designation. These markings are located towards the rear and center of the slide, rendered in a small, blocky font that blends with the weathered finish. No decorative patterns or logos are prominently visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, with a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal. It is rectangular in shape and appears to be made of the same polymer material as the grip, with a smooth finish and no visible finger rests, logos, or additional texturing.
